chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Bail Application No.S-501/2024 _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_____________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For hearing of Bail Application. 05-03-2025 Mr. Amanullah Luhur, advocate for the Applicants. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State. -------- Learned counsel for the applicants submits that case has been disposed of under compromise vide order dated 10-12-2024 passed by the learned Judicial Magistrate-V, Larkana, therefore, does not press instant bail application. Accordingly, it stands dismissed being infructuous. JUDGE
